channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Dead by Daylight 10th anniversary marked with new character, map and major game improvement reveals
item.content:encoded:
Big things are coming to Dead by Daylight, as Behaviour Interactive have marked the game’s 10th anniversary with a big reveal stream to talk about the game’s future. There’s more than just more collaborations (though there’s plenty of those on the way), but also gameplay revamps and graphical overhauls that will rejuvenate the decade-old game.

In the immediate future, we have the previously announced addition of Jason Voorhees from the Friday the 13th franchise entering The Fog on 16th June, but since he will be a killer-only addition, Behaviour has also worked to reveal a new original survivor. Shane Wiigwaas will be the game’s first Indigenous survivor when he joins the game on 25th June in the Dead by Daylight: The Life Road chapter. Shane is a lawyer from the Anishinaabe community searching for answers to a miscarriage of justice that led to hie cousins being wrongly convicted after a mysterious disappearance.

Further afield, there will the community collab Chorus of Sin chapter in August, Art the Clown from Terrifier in November this year, and 2027 will see a chapter based on The Casting of Frank Stone.

Another new map and original realm will arrive in the shape of the shopping mall, which will combine shopping malls and the zeitgeist horror of liminal spaces. This will look to bring more lore to original characters, with Dwight in particular, and will launch in December.

But the real changes for the game will come with a sweeping visual overhaul that is set to release in 2027. This brings new character models that allow for greater animations, more realistic facial animations and more – new voice lines are also being recorded for these original characters. Maps and environments are also being overhauled, bringing enhanced lighting, sharing, textures and even a dynamic weather system that will ramp up the atmosphere when its raining or storming.

Some new game modes are also on the way, though these are still early in development. A 1v1 experience will pit a single survivor against a single killer, while a zombies mode will have survivors trying to find a cure for the undead while a killer tries to stop them.

Most exciting for the dedicated community is the promise of fully opening up sandboxed modding. This will include a suite of tools to create new maps, modes and more for the horror game.

And we’ll round things out with the cluster of IPs and cosmetics, with Ice Nine Kills, Silent Hill, Diablo IV and even Scooby Doo set to appear in Dead by Daylight cosmetics in the coming year.



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/15/dead-by-daylight-10th-anniversary-marked-with-new-character-map-and-major-game-improvement-reveals/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Invariant is a Antarctica based horror coming from a former Serious Sam dev
item.content:encoded:
Former Croteam team member Josip Makjanić has founded Faros Game Studio, and the first project that is being worked on is a first person horror called Invariant. As you’ll see from the trailer the game has been influenced by The Thing, Half Life, and F.E.A.R. So if you’re a fan of any of those this may be worth keeping an eye on.

Invariant is set in a remote Antarctic research facility which gets cut off from the outside world. With the facility cut off from any help things quickly start to deteriorate. Communications systems fail, the researchers look like they turn on each other, and dangerous creatures stalk the corridors of the facility, posing a fatal danger to anyone that crosses them. As one of the people trapped, you will need to find ways to survive, solve puzzles, and figure out the central mystery that has caused this sudden collapse into horror. Josip Makjanić has released a nearly 20 minutes dev diary going over the origins of the Invariant project, which you can watch below.

A release date is yet to be set for Invariant.

Source: Press Release



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/15/invariant-is-a-antarctica-based-horror-coming-from-a-former-serious-sam-dev/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
